title: Shopping - Clothes Market

vocabulary.example: I go to the market every Saturday.
I need new clothes for winter.
The price of this shirt is 200,000 VND.
The shop gives a 20% discount today.
This jacket is too expensive for me.
The vegetables are very cheap here.
Can we bargain on the price?
What size do you wear - small, medium, or large?

grammar: Can / Could for requests (Can you help me?)
phrase: How much is this? / Can I try this on? / Do you have a smaller size?
description: Học về mua sắm quần áo tại chợ, So sánh giá, Hỏi giá cả, Thương lượng

title: Transport - Getting Around

vocabulary.example: I take the bus to work every day.
The train from Hanoi to Da Nang takes 12 hours.
Let's take a taxi to the airport.
Where is the train station?
I need to buy a ticket for tomorrow.
What's the schedule for buses to Hanoi?
The train was delayed by two hours.
Do I need to transfer to get to the city center?

grammar: How long take? / How much time?
phrase: How much is a ticket to...? / When does the next bus leave? / Is there a direct train?
description: Học về giao thông vận tải, Hỏi giờ khởi hành, Mua vé

title: Technology - Technology in Daily Life

vocabulary.example: I use my computer for work every day.
I can't go anywhere without my smartphone.
The internet connection is very slow today.
Which app do you use for shopping?
Can you download the file from the link?
I upload my photos to Google Drive.
My phone's battery is almost empty.
What's the password for the wifi?

phrase: How do I download this? / Can you help me with my phone? / Do you have wifi?
description: Học về công nghệ, Cách sử dụng ứng dụng, Các từ kỹ thuật cơ bản

title: Sports - Favorite Sports and Activities

vocabulary.example: I play football every weekend.
Swimming is my favorite exercise.
I do yoga three times a week.
I go to the gym early in the morning.
Which team do you support?
Regular exercise is good for your health.
The football match starts at 8pm.
What's your favorite hobby?

phrase: What sports do you play? / How often do you exercise? / Do you like football?
description: Học về thể thao, Vận động yêu thích, Hỏi về hoạt động thể chất

title: Environment - Environmental Issues

vocabulary.example: Air pollution is a serious problem in cities.
We should use less plastic to protect the environment.
I recycle my plastic bags and glass bottles.
Protecting the environment is everyone's responsibility.
Trees clean the air and provide oxygen.
Clean water is important for our health.
We should save energy by using less electricity.
Climate change is affecting our weather patterns.

phrase: We should protect the environment / Don't use single-use plastic / Save water!
description: Học về vấn đề môi trường, Tái chế, Bảo vệ thiên nhiên

title: Work - Jobs and Professions

vocabulary.example: I have a job in a technology company.
I work in an office downtown.
My boss is very kind and supportive.
I have good relationships with my colleagues.
The salary for this position is competitive.
We have a meeting at 3pm today.
The project deadline is next Friday.
I have 5 years of experience in this field.

phrase: What do you do? / Where do you work? / How long have you worked there?
description: Học về công việc, Mô tả công việc, Nói về kinh nghiệm

title: Business - Business Communication

vocabulary.example: The company's profit increased by 15% this year.
Annual revenue reached $5 million.
We need to expand our market share.
Our marketing strategy focuses on social media.
We plan to invest in new technology.
We signed a three-year contract with the supplier.
We're negotiating the terms of the agreement.
Our main client is a fashion retail company.

phrase: Let's discuss the business plan / Can we schedule a meeting? / What's your proposal?
description: Học về giao dịch kinh doanh, Giàn phán, Hợp đồng

title: Culture - Cultural Differences

vocabulary.example: Vietnamese culture has many rich traditions.
It's a custom to remove shoes before entering a temple.
We celebrate Tet with family gatherings.
The Mid-Autumn Festival is an important occasion.
Vietnam's cultural heritage is fascinating.
Vietnam has 54 ethnic groups.
We should respect other people's cultures.
Each culture has its own unique characteristics.

phrase: Tell me about your culture / What traditions do you have? / How do you celebrate festivals?
description: Học về các nền văn hóa, So sánh các truyền thống, Nói về lễ hội
